subject: Security vulnerability found
description: We discovered a security issue in the API endpoint. This is a critical security concern that needs immediate attention.

subject: Refund for duplicate charge
description: I was charged twice for the same invoice last month. Please process a refund for the duplicate billing charge.

subject: Feature request: bulk export
description: Please add a bulk export feature for reports. This enhancement would greatly improve our workflow.

subject: Cannot reset password
description: I cannot reset my password. The reset email never arrives and I am locked out of my account.

subject: App throwing 500 error
description: Getting a 500 internal server error when clicking the submit button. Happens every time, easy to reproduce.
